title: origanum albicans
intro: Origanum albicans, also known as sweet marjoram, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family. Its medicinal properties include antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which contribute to its various health benefits. The health benefits of Origanum albicans include relief from anxiety and insomnia, reduced pain and inflammation, and improved digestion. Origanum albicans can be prepared as a tea, essential oil, or dried herb for use in cooking and herbal remedies.
